name: Mushroom and Ham Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettucine according to package directions; drain and keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, in a large skillet over medium heat, melt butter.
3. Add ham and mushrooms; cook, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes.
4. Add cream, increase heat to medium-high; boil 5-7 minutes or until mixture coats the back of a spoon.
5. Stir in half of the cheese.
6. Add fettucine; toss to combine.
7. Sprinkle with pepper and remaining cheese.
